violations.text: Raw animal foods eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods produce and dressings in the 2 door slider. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off and placed out of order at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to use ice machine until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Various food and sauces were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Beef and shrimp were observed thawing in the 3-bay sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Beef and shrimp were placed into refrigeration at the time of inspection. Proper thawing methods reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026
Various food was observed stored on the floor in the kitchen and storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026
Food was observed being stored in plastic shopping bags. All food must be stored in food grade containers. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

The following equipment was observed in poor repair. -3-bay sink hot-water knob (missing) -Kitchen hand sink cold-water knob (missing) -3-bay sink plumbing (leak) -Bar hand sink (non-operational) Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026

The cutting boards in the prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink and dishwasher. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the hood system, and all freezer/refrigeration units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026
The wall in the kitchen bathroom area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2026

The walls behind the 3-bay sink are constructed of dry wall and wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026
Dishes were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024

Eggs were observed held at 51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved to refrigerator. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024

Meats were observed thawing in prep sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024

Utensils in the kitchen are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
Freezer was observed with an accumulation of frost buildup. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. 1. Handwash sink 2. Refrigeration 3. Shelving New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024

The walls behind three bay sink is constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
